mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_activity_signup WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} AND student_id = #{studentId}
SELECT s.*, st.student_name FROM t_activity_signup s LEFT JOIN t_student_info st ON s.student_id = st.student_id WHERE s.activity_id = #{activityId} ORDER BY s.create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE t_activity_signup SET status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, approve_by = #{approveBy}, approve_time = #{approveTime}, approve_remark = #{approveRemark} WHERE signup_id = #{signupId}
